What We Do

Every Type of
Furniture Repaired

From a hairline scratch on your dining table to a fully collapsed antique frame, our team brings 20 years of hands-on expertise to every job — large or small.

01
Scratch & Dent Repair
Invisible blending using hand-mixed stains matched to your original finish. No patch, no trace.
Wood · Veneer · Laminate
02
Antique Restoration
Period-appropriate techniques and materials that preserve the original character and value of your piece.
All Eras Welcome
03
Structural Repair
Full disassembly, old glue removal, and precision regluing for wobble-free results that last decades.
Chairs · Tables · Frames
04
Upholstery Repair
Torn fabric, damaged foam, broken frames. We restore your sofas, chairs, and cushions to like-new.
Fabric · Foam · Springs
05
Refinishing & Polishing
Strip decades of wear and apply a hand-rubbed oil, lacquer, or shellac finish tailored to your taste.
All Finish Types
06
Leather Restoration
Cracked, faded, or torn leather cleaned, conditioned, and color-matched back to its former glory.
All Leather Types
Before & After

The Work
Speaks for Itself

Each project tells a story. Browse a selection of recent restorations from across the Denver metro area.

Before After
Victorian Parlour Chair
Reglued joints · Fabric replaced · Finish restored
Before After
Mid-Century Credenza
Deep scratch repair · Tung oil refinish
Before After
Farmhouse Dining Table
Water ring removal · Full refinish
Before After
Antique Secretary Desk
Veneer rebonded · Shellac polish
How It Works

Simple from
Start to Finish

01
Submit Your Photos
Fill out our quick form and upload a photo of the damage. Takes less than 2 minutes.
02
Receive Your Estimate
Brandon personally reviews your project and sends a detailed, honest quote within 24 hours.
03
We Handle Pickup
We schedule a convenient pickup — or you drop it at our Denver workshop. Your call.
04
Delivery & Delight
Your restored piece is delivered back to you. 100% satisfaction guaranteed, every time.
Brandon Maestas · Owner & Master Craftsman
About Us

Brandon
Maestas

"Every piece of furniture has a story worth preserving."

I've been repairing furniture since I was a teenager working summers in my uncle's shop. Over 20 years later, I've seen just about every kind of damage imaginable — and fixed it all.

Restore & Refinish is a locally owned Denver business. When you work with us, you work directly with me.

20+ years hands-on experience
All furniture types: wood, leather, upholstery
Free pickup & delivery across Denver metro
Licensed, insured & locally owned since 2004
Start With a Free Quote
Reviews

What Our
Clients Say

Trusted by hundreds of Denver homeowners. Every review is real — we let our work do the talking.

★★★★★

"Brandon restored my grandmother's dining set. I cried when I saw it. Absolutely incredible work, so reasonably priced."

S
Sarah M.
Cherry Creek, Denver
★★★★★

"My mid-century sofa had a huge tear and a cracked frame. They fixed everything — it looks even better than when I bought it."

T

★★★★★

Get in Touch

Let's Restore
Your Piece

"No obligation. No pressure. Just honest work."

Describe your furniture, upload a photo, and Brandon will personally get back to you with a detailed, no-obligation quote within one business day.
